title: Malta’s Ultimate Summer Skin Prep Plan: Treatments to Try Now
excerpt: As summer approaches, glowing skin isn’t just a dream—it’s a plan. While most people wait until the heat hits to start prepping their...
body_text:
As summer approaches, glowing skin isn’t just a dream—it’s a plan. While most people wait until the heat hits to start prepping their skin, the truth is: your summer glow starts in June. This transitional month is your golden window to refresh, rejuvenate, and ready your skin for sunshine, beach days, and camera-ready moments. Here’s how to get ahead—with the help of science-backed treatments from Carisma Aesthetics.

Why June Is the Perfect Time to Start Your Summer Skin Prep
June sits at the sweet spot: post-spring renewal and pre-summer exposure. Your skin is still recovering from colder months, and it's now more receptive to deep treatments and hydration boosters. Plus, many aesthetic procedures require a little time to work their magic or heal—so starting now ensures you’re photo-ready for all your summer plans.

[Image: Skin]
Step One: Rehydrate and Replenish
Dryness, dullness, and loss of elasticity from winter can linger into June. Enter Profhilo—a revolutionary injectable treatment that hydrates from within using hyaluronic acid. Unlike traditional fillers, Profhilo spreads beneath the skin’s surface to boost moisture and stimulate collagen and elastin.

Why it's perfect for June:
No downtime

Visible radiance in just a few weeks

Works beautifully under the summer glow


Pro Tip: Combine Profhilo with a skin booster facial for that juicy, dewy finish that screams healthy summer skin.



Step Two: Smooth and Refine with Microneedling
Want that glass-skin glow without makeup? Microneedling is your go-to. By creating tiny, controlled micro-injuries in the skin, it stimulates natural regeneration—boosting collagen and fading pigmentation, acne scars, and fine lines.

Why it’s summer skin’s best-kept secret:
Improves texture and clarity

Can reduce sun damage and uneven tone

Results continue to improve over time


Important: Be mindful of sun exposure after microneedling—June allows you time to heal and protect your skin before peak UV levels hit in July and August.



Step Three: Laser Hair Removal for a Carefree Summer
Tired of shaving or waxing through the heat? June is the perfect time to start laser hair removal. Most treatments need multiple sessions spaced a few weeks apart—so starting now means smoother skin right when you want it most.

Key zones to consider:
Underarms (hello sleeveless tops!)

Bikini area

Legs


Bonus: It reduces ingrown hairs and helps even out skin tone in commonly irritated areas.



Step Four: Tackle Uneven Skin Tone and Pigmentation
If your skin tone isn’t as even as you’d like, or if you’re dealing with dark spots, June is ideal for a targeted peel or treatment plan. Carisma Aesthetics offers a range of options tailored to your skin type—from gentle brightening to deeper resurfacing, depending on your goals.

Best treatments for even tone:
Mild chemical peels

Vitamin C-enriched facials

Targeted pigmentation treatments



Step Five: Prep Your Lips for a Natural Summer Look
Whether you’re sipping iced lattes or heading to a wedding, natural-looking lips are in. Our Russian Lip techniquegives volume and shape while maintaining a defined, elegant look—perfect for minimal summer makeup.

Trending: Clients are asking for subtle definition, hydration, and balance—just enough to feel confident and fresh.


Step Six: Pre-Wedding or Event Glow-Up
June also kicks off wedding season and summer event calendars. Whether you’re a bride, guest, or just ready for your close-up, planning your aesthetic treatments now ensures your skin looks and feels its best when the big day arrives.

Suggested glow-up timeline:
4–6 weeks before: Profhilo, microneedling, tear trough fillers

2–3 weeks before: Lip filler touch-up, skin booster facial

1 week before: Hydrating facial, light peel, LED therapy



Your June Glow-Up Starts at Carisma Aesthetics
Whether you're after glowing skin, silky-smooth legs, or a refreshed appearance, Carisma Aesthetics offers customised summer prep plans that work with your schedule, skin, and style.

Why choose Carisma Aesthetics?
Trusted techniques with natural results

Highly trained medical-aesthetic team

Luxurious, discreet, and personalised care


Wrap-Up: It’s Not Just a Treatment—It’s a Ritual
Getting your skin ready for summer is more than a checklist—it’s a self-care ritual. By starting in June, you give yourself the time and space to look and feel your best. And remember, skin confidence isn’t about perfection—it’s about radiance, health, and joy.

Ready to begin your summer beauty journey? Book your consultation at Carisma Aesthetics and let us help you glow from the inside out. For the ultimate wellness boost, pair your aesthetic experience with a luxurious spa day at Carisma Spa—because glowing skin deserves total relaxation.
